name: @ont/adapter-header
description: ONT B4 adapter — canonical Bitcoin header source. Fetches a header range from an untrusted provider, validates it through @ont/bitcoin validateHeaderChain (#82) against trusted launch config (checkpoint + params), and returns a BitcoinHeaderSource the audited B3 inclusion verifier consumes. Produces a validated source or nothing; decides nothing.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/launch-config && vitest run
